Court reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998, 415-948-8289, Reported, (501).

9:33 am Parties report they do not have an agreement.

9:50 am
Hearing is held. The Court announces the tentative ruling on both motions; Motion to compel responses to Form interrogatories - granted, objections overruled. Motion to compel Production of Documents - granted, sanctions granted in the amount of 1,950. ARGUED. Defendant argues all documents have been produced. Defendant has issues with physically reproducing the 8,000 pages and search every city department, requests to stay discovery, to be sanctioned is unfathomable. Plaintiff argues, to deny stay of discovery, there are live causes of action, need to produce all documents from relevant agencies, documents reproduced, full verified production need to be made. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff 1049 Market Street, Llc'S Re-Notice Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories is taken under submission. Parties are ordered to submit a joint proposed order which contains common points that parties agree to and include points that parties disagree on in relation to the tentative ruling the Court has issued. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998, 415-948-8289, Reported, (501).
